title: GLM 5.2 SUPER MODE: Here's HOW TO USE GLM-5.2 to it's FULL POTENTIAL
summary: GLM 5.2 is presented as a major upgrade over GLM 5.1 with strong performance on coding tasks. The video demonstrates using GLM 5.2 with Verdent to build a full creator sponsorship dashboard application from a single prompt, including data persistence, responsive UI, and deployment capabilities.
writeup: The video positions GLM 5.2 as a significant step up from GLM 5.1, with a focus on coding performance. The demonstration pairs GLM 5.2 with Verdent to generate a complete creator sponsorship dashboard from a single prompt, covering data persistence, a responsive UI, and deployment. The takeaway centers on prompt-to-code generation: one instruction produces a working application rather than isolated snippets.
